name: World Kinect Corporation
description: World Kinect Corporation is a leading global energy management company, providing energy procurement, distribution, and advisory services to customers in the aviation, marine, and land transportation industries. The company offers a comprehensive portfolio of solutions, including liquid fuels, natural gas, electricity, renewable energy, and carbon offsets, helping clients optimize their energy use, manage price volatility, and achieve sustainability goals across more than 200 countries and territories.
